ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "sub_industry" TEXT /* Sub-industry the company operates in */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed */,
  "delisting_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was delisted */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount traded on the given date */,
  "adjustflag" INTEGER /* Adjustment flag for the price record */,
  "adjusted_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price */,
  "adjusted_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price */,
  "adjusted_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., junior, senior, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the analyst belongs to (e.g., equity research, portfolio management) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* Type of the portfolio (e.g., long-only, long-short) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the stock belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held in the portfolio */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., long, short) */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was entered into the portfolio */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was exited from the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst accessing the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the stock data was accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the membership belongs to */,
  "member_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., broker, dealer) */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the member */,
  "member_email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_memberships_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst providing the rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being rated */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was provided */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
